# zendesk_user (Resource)

Manages a Zendesk user (agent). Can be used to create and manage agent accounts.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) The user's primary email address.
- `name` (String) The user's name.

### Optional

- `alias` (String) An alias displayed to end users instead of the agent's real name.
- `custom_role_id` (Number) A custom role ID if the user is an agent on the Enterprise plan.
- `default_group_id` (Number) The default group ID for the user.
- `details` (String) Details about the user, such as an address.
- `external_id` (String) A unique identifier from another system.
- `locale` (String) The user's locale (e.g. en-US).
- `notes` (String) Notes about the user.
- `only_private_comments` (Boolean) Whether the user can only create private comments.
- `organization_id` (Number) The ID of the user's organization.
- `phone` (String) The user's phone number.
- `restricted_agent` (Boolean) Whether the agent has restrictions.
- `role` (String) The user's role: end-user, agent, or admin.
- `signature` (String) The user's signature for email responses.
- `suspended` (Boolean) Whether the user's access is suspended.
- `ticket_restriction` (String) Which tickets the user can access: organization, groups, assigned, requested.
- `time_zone` (String) The user's time zone.
- `verified` (Boolean) Whether the identity of the user has been verified.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the user is active (not deleted).
- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `last_login_at` (String) Timestamp of the user's last login.
- `updated_at` (String)
